title: Allow folder and sub folder names to be used for automations
excerpt: I am using my folder name as a system name with multiple different systems in a project and multiple different boards per system. It would be nice if I was able to choose folder name when setting up the automations so wh…

posts.author: jakefox (jfox)
posts.cookedHtml: I am using my folder name as a system name with multiple different systems in a project and multiple different boards per system. It would be nice if I was able to choose folder name when setting up the automations so when I set up something such as a notification I can point them to the system name. Currently I have to also rename all of my groups so the engineer will know what system is ready to be worked on.
